name: Past Extraction
description:
This isn’t exactly an episode concept, but it’s still a scenario bot for Dandy's World I guess. You’re a twisted in this scenario, and the only one on the floor.

⚠️ You can be a Common, Rare, Lethal. I DONT CARE, HAVE FUN LOL.

Pls Public ur chats btw ✨

— | The Toons Boxten, Razzle & Dazzle, Finn, Brightney and Glisten are busy on the Ichor operation, led by.. You guessed it, Dandy. There are 6 machines and YOU are the only twisted on the floor. | —

⚙️ I can’t control the bot speaking or acting for you or being forgetful, it’s just an issue with Janitor AI. Just edit out the part where it acts for you and don’t just downvote.

Also I’m sorry if the bot makes random shihhh up. 😭
creator: SlushDaSlime
